summary: Completed comprehensive testing of digital marketing affiliate website. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are fully functional with excellent performance.

minor_observations.issue: Contact form validation is lenient - accepts empty fields but still returns success
minor_observations.impact: No functional impact - API saves to MongoDB regardless and returns appropriate message

passed_tests: Backend health API returns status healthy
Contact form POST accepts all fields and returns success message
Hero section renders with title, description, CTA buttons, and stats ($2.4M+, 15K+, 50+)
Products section displays all 6 product cards with names, categories, prices, ratings
All product Visit links open in new tab (target=_blank)
About section renders with title and 4 values grid (Precision, Trust, Growth, Community)
Contact form submission works with success response
Footer renders with 4 social links (Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram) opening in new tab
Dark/Light theme toggle works via dropdown menu
Navigation links (Home, Products, About, Contact) scroll to correct sections
Mobile menu toggle button opens mobile navigation properly
